text.title: AI Content Quality Review Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of AI Content Quality Review.

example.scenario: Founder ships a 1200-word post; rubric finds 2/100 entity density + 2 stats with no citation; decision=revise; founder adds 12 entities + 3 sources; rerun passes.
example.trace: preconditions=true → procedure applied → artefact emitted → validate-script passes
